chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 1491 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.1 & 14 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No. 3692/2023 14.01.2026 Mr. M. Rizwan Saeed, advocate for the applicant Mr. Umer Farooq, advocate for respondent Pursuant to order dated 13.11.2025 learned counsel states that it may be in the interest of justice and revenue to set aside the impugned order and remand the matter back to the learned Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law expeditiously, preferably within 90 days. Learned counsel further seeks that pending the aforesaid no coercive action be taken against the respondent arising here from. Learned counsel for the applicant articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the reference application may be disposed off in the said terms. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
